source: Official Journal of the European Union L 119, 4 May 2016

regime.regulator: Member State Data Protection Authorities (coordinated by European Data Protection Board)
regime.notes: Fines up to €20M or 4% of global annual turnover, whichever is higher.

obligations.title: Principles relating to processing of personal data
obligations.description: Lawfulness, fairness, transparency; purpose limitation; data minimisation; accuracy; storage limitation; integrity and confidentiality; accountability

obligations.title: Lawfulness of processing
obligations.description: Processing is lawful only if one of six bases applies: consent, contract, legal obligation, vital interests, public task, or legitimate interests.

obligations.title: Conditions for consent
obligations.description: Consent must be freely given, specific, informed, unambiguous, demonstrable, and as easy to withdraw as to give.

obligations.title: Processing of special categories of personal data
obligations.description: Processing sensitive data is prohibited except under specific conditions (explicit consent, employment law, vital interests, etc.).

obligations.title: Transparent information and communication
obligations.description: Provide transparent, concise, and accessible information about processing.

obligations.title: Information to be provided when data is collected from the data subject
obligations.description: Specific information elements at the time of collection.

obligations.title: Information to be provided when data is not collected from the data subject
obligations.description: Specific information elements when collecting from third parties.

obligations.title: Right of access by the data subject
obligations.description: Right to confirmation, access to data, and information about processing.

obligations.title: Right to rectification
obligations.description: Right to have inaccurate data corrected.

obligations.title: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten')
obligations.description: Right to have data deleted under specific circumstances.

obligations.title: Right to restriction of processing
obligations.description: Right to have processing limited in specific cases.

obligations.title: Notification obligation regarding rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing
obligations.description: Communicate rectifications/erasures to third parties.

obligations.title: Right to data portability
obligations.description: Right to receive data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format and transmit it to another controller.

obligations.title: Right to object
obligations.description: Right to object to processing based on legitimate interests or direct marketing.

obligations.title: Automated individual decision-making, including profiling
obligations.description: Right not to be subject to decisions based solely on automated processing with legal or similarly significant effects.

obligations.title: Responsibility of the controller
obligations.description: Implement technical and organisational measures to ensure and demonstrate compliance.

obligations.title: Data protection by design and by default
obligations.description: Implement privacy by design and by default.

obligations.title: Joint controllers
obligations.description: Arrangements between joint controllers.

obligations.title: Processor
obligations.description: Processor requirements, including written contract with specific terms.

obligations.title: Records of processing activities
obligations.description: Maintain records of processing (with SME exemptions).

obligations.title: Security of processing
obligations.description: Implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure security appropriate to the risk.

obligations.title: Notification of a personal data breach to the supervisory authority
obligations.description: Notify the supervisory authority of breaches within 72 hours where feasible.

obligations.title: Communication of a personal data breach to the data subject
obligations.description: Notify affected individuals of high-risk breaches without undue delay.

obligations.title: Data protection impact assessment (DPIA)
obligations.description: Carry out DPIAs for high-risk processing.

obligations.title: Prior consultation
obligations.description: Consult supervisory authority when DPIA indicates high residual risk.

obligations.title: Designation of the data protection officer
obligations.description: Designate a DPO in specified cases.

obligations.title: General principle for transfers
obligations.description: Transfers only under GDPR adequacy or appropriate safeguards.

obligations.title: Transfers on the basis of an adequacy decision
obligations.description: Transfers to adequate countries.

obligations.title: Transfers subject to appropriate safeguards
obligations.description: SCCs, BCRs, approved codes of conduct/certifications.

obligations.title: Derogations for specific situations
obligations.description: Limited exceptions for specific transfers.
